issues.detail: The skill is vendor-locked to ax, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: reconstruct-from-commit
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully follows the rubric with ax commands, session IDs, workflow, and evidence, while Response A only provides generic git steps and no ax usage.

scenarios.name: reconstruct-from-date
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides the required commands, session IDs, workflow, and evidence, while Response A offers no relevant information.

scenarios.name: reconstruct-from-topic
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to meet the rubric: A is generic and does not provide any ax commands, while B does not start with the required recall command, does not list candidate commits, nor provide the detailed workflow and evidence required.
